system: fully parabolic-parabolic Keller-Segel: u_t=div(grad u - u grad v), v_t=Delta v + u - v
ic: u0=840 exp(-84 r^2), v0=420 exp(-42 r^2) (M_u=10*pi, supercritical)
kind: particle pp diagnostics (copied from ldg_comparison for traceability)
reaction: v decay+inject minimum-variance integer kernel (no (u-v)/v quotient)
bc: core-adaptive periodic Fourier window (LDG-aligned, not strict Neumann)
tgap_note: t_gap(1.05)=8e-6 is a reconstruction-bandwidth gap (changes N AND K=5->10); not the grid t_b
